message:
feat(diary): Add comprehensive diary loading and validation functions

NEW FUNCTIONS:

1. loadDiaryEntry(diaryPath)
   Load and validate a single diary entry from disk:
   - Verify file exists
   - Read file as UTF-8
   - Parse JSON with error handling
   - Validate against DiaryEntrySchema using Zod
   - Apply migration for backward compatibility
   Throws DiaryLoadError with specific error types:
   - file_not_found, json_parse, schema_validation, unknown

2. loadAllDiaries(diaryDir)
   Load all valid diary entries from a directory:
   - Scans for .json files
   - Loads each entry (skips invalid with warning)
   - Sorts by timestamp (newest first)
   - Returns array of validated DiaryEntry objects

3. findDiaryBySession(diaryDir, sessionPath)
   Find diary entry by session path for quick lookups

4. migrateOldDiary(diary)
   Migrate older diary formats to current schema:
   - Ensures all array fields exist with defaults
   - Maintains backward compatibility with schema evolution

ERROR HANDLING:
- Custom DiaryLoadError class with typed errorType property
- Specific error types enable targeted error handling:
  file_not_found, json_parse, schema_validation, unknown
- Each error includes cause chain for debugging

Minor: Whitespace cleanup in saveDiaryEntry

WHY:
These functions enable diary inspection, statistics computation, and
building on existing diary data. The typed error handling makes debugging
easier when diary files are corrupted or schema changes occur.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
